title: Simulated strict 1F1B training schedule, Pangu-R-72B, DP2 x PP4 x TP2 x EP2
note: Each tick is one global 1F1B time slice across four PP stages. opFocus is a representative architecture node for 3D highlighting; this JSON is a deterministic schedule simulation, not a measured kernel trace.

config.schedule: non-interleaved 1F1B with warmup, steady state, and drain
config.rankFormula: rank = (((dp * PP + pp) * TP + tp) * EP + ep)
